title: 'Dubai, a city of spectacle and a global hub, is now caught up in geopolitics'
subhead: Geographer Roman Stadnicki, who specializes in Gulf countries' urban landscapes, discusses the impact of Iranian strikes on the United Arab Emirates' principality.

title: France enters Iran conflict in 'strictly defensive' posture
subhead: In a solemn address on Tuesday evening, Emmanuel Macron announced, among other measures, the deployment of the aircraft carrier Charles-de-Gaulle to the eastern Mediterranean, confirming the likelihood of a wider regional conflict in the Middle East.

title: Iran's neighbors, under drone attacks, confront their vulnerability
subhead: Lacking experience in countering kamikaze drones, especially the infamous Shahed models, the Gulf countries have shown how unprepared they were for the threat posed by Iran, which is determined to exploit their vulnerability.

title: In Dubai, French influencers experience new reality under Iranian strikes
subhead: Many French social media personalities have chosen to relocate to the Emirati city, often for tax reasons. With Iranian bombs falling, online influencers like Maeva Ghennam are finding the dream less appealing.

title: 'A war justified once again by a lie turns into a race against the clock for Donald Trump'
subhead: The third American war waged in the Middle East by a president of the United States bears little resemblance to the previous ones, observes Le Monde's columnist Gilles Paris.

Russia powerless to help ally Iran under US-Israel strikes
subhead: After the fall of Bashar al-Assad in Syria and Nicolas Maduro in Venezuela, verbal support is all Vladimir Putin can offer the Iranian government after Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei's death. However, Moscow could benefit from rising hydrocarbon prices.

title: Iranians' daily life upended by massive strikes: 'And now, what will happen?'
subhead: Since US-Israeli airstrikes began, Iranians – cut off from the internet and information – have struggled cope amid daily explosions. The civilian death toll continues to rise.

title: Iranian regime scrambles to survive after Khamenei's death
subhead: Amid scenes of celebration and mourning, the formation of an interim government and ongoing bombings, Iran has entered a period of profound uncertainty, where the Islamic Republic's very survival and the reshaping of its internal balance of power are at stake.
